Approximates memory-mapping for massive files by using Blob slicing.
Allows parsing massive binaries iteratively.

Converter for Keras models to ONNX format.
Implements architectural passes for layout optimization, quantization, and complex type support.

The Keras model topology in JSON format.

Converts the Keras model to an ONNX model, executing all required architectural passes.

Main entry point to run all normalizer passes after importing an N-to-N model.
Modifies the graph in place.

136. Verify absolute parity by compiling the imported graph instantly to WebGPU and running a dummy input.
137. Allow users to provide a reference output tensor from their original framework to prove identical execution.
